title: TVK Rally in Erode East Draws Record Youth Turnout for Vijay
summary: Actor-politician Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam roadshow in Erode East drew an estimated 1.2 lakh first-time voters, signalling a sharp three-way contest in the textile city.

title: Erode Turmeric Market Eyes Middle-East Boom After GI Tag Push
summary: Despite a short-term price slump from oversupply, the new GI tag for Erode turmeric has unlocked direct export contracts with buyers in UAE, Saudi Arabia and Canada.

title: DMK’s S. Muthusamy Pledges New Trade Centre for Erode West
summary: Sitting MLA S. Muthusamy promised a ₹450-crore Trade & Convention Centre to boost handloom and powerloom exports during a meeting of the Erode Trade Association.

title: Heatwave Pushes Erode Mercury to 41°C; Farmers Brace for Pump Diesel Shortage
summary: Erode recorded its hottest day of the season at 41.2°C. Farmer collectives have urged the government to ensure uninterrupted diesel supply for irrigation pumps.

title: Perundurai Industrial Cluster to Get ₹120-Crore Effluent Treatment Upgrade
summary: The state pollution board sanctioned a major upgrade to the Common Effluent Treatment Plant at Perundurai SIPCOT to address soil and water contamination concerns.

title: Static Surveillance Teams Seize 1,800 Litres of Illicit Liquor in Bhavani
summary: Election enforcement teams raided storage points across Bhavani and Anthiyur, seizing 1,800 litres of illicit arrack meant for distribution before polling day.

title: Erode SVEEP Campaign Reaches 96% Voter-Slip Distribution
summary: The district administration confirmed that 96% of voter information slips have been distributed door-to-door, with the remainder targeted by tomorrow evening.

title: High-Level Election Security Meeting Held in Erode with CRPF Commander
summary: A high-level election security consultation meeting was held in Erode with the Central Armed Police Force Commander, Collector S. Kandasamy, and observers. 630+ paramilitary personnel have been deployed for sensitive booths.

title: DMK's S. Muthusamy Promises New Trade Centre for Erode West
summary: DMK candidate S. Muthusamy (Erode West) promised a new Trade Centre for industrial growth during a trade association meeting.

title: BJP's Yuvaraja Promises ₹10,000 Family Assistance Grant
summary: BJP candidate M. Yuvaraja (Erode West) appealed for lotus symbol votes and promised a ₹10,000 family assistance grant if NDA forms government.

title: AIADMK Alleges Cash Distribution to Women in Erode East
summary: AIADMK alleged cash distribution (₹100 each) to women during an aarthi event in Erode East; the election officer confirmed a violation probe.

title: Flying Squads Seize ₹3.28 Lakh in Modakkurichi & Perundurai
summary: Flying squads seized ₹3.28 lakh yesterday in Modakkurichi and Perundurai constituencies. Total district seizure now stands at ₹1.90 crore.

title: Postal Ballot Collection Process Fully Completed
summary: Postal ballot collection process is fully completed in Erode district. 290 of 6,900 registrants missed the opportunity.

title: Ballot Sheet Pasting Begins in All 8 Returning Offices
summary: Ballot sheet pasting work began at 8 AM today in all eight returning offices across Erode district.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Reaches 27.51% Coverage
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution is ongoing for 17.59 lakh voters; 4.83 lakh slips delivered so far across all eight constituencies.

title: Voter Awareness Rally at Barkurmalai in Anthiyur
summary: A voter awareness rally was organised at Barkurmalai in the Anthiyur area to promote 100% turnout on polling day.

title: Forest Department Leads Awareness Rally at Thurusanampalayam
summary: The Forest Department led a voter awareness rally at Thurusanampalayam urging maximum participation in the April 23 polling.

title: SVEEP Cultural Programs Continue Across the District
summary: SVEEP creative programs including cultural events and human formations continue across Erode to drive voter engagement.

title: Minister Sakkarapani Highlights Welfare Schemes
summary: Minister Sakkarapani campaigned in Erode highlighting DMK government welfare schemes that have benefited every family in the district.

title: BJP's Kirthika Shivakumar Campaigns in Modakkurichi
summary: BJP candidate Kirthika Shivakumar campaigned in Modakkurichi villages quoting AIADMK promises for women and farmers.

title: AIADMK's R. Manoharan Conducts Door-to-Door in Erode East
summary: AIADMK candidate R. Manoharan conducted intensive door-to-door canvassing in Erode East with party workers.

title: Congress's Gobinath Continues Outreach in Erode East
summary: Congress candidate Gobinath Palaniappan continued outreach in Erode East with full alliance support.

title: TVK's D. Shanmugan Holds Public Meetings in Modakkurichi
summary: TVK candidate Engineer D. Shanmugan held public meetings with local promises in Modakkurichi.

title: Hilly Terrain Slows Campaign in Thalavadi
summary: Difficult hilly terrain and language barriers are slowing campaign outreach in the Thalavadi taluk areas of Bhavanisagar.

title: 630+ Paramilitary Deployed in Sensitive Pockets
summary: Over 630 paramilitary personnel have been deployed for enhanced security in sensitive and hilly pockets of the district.

title: Collector Inspects Polling Arrangements in Perundurai
summary: Collector S. Kandasamy inspected polling-related arrangements in Perundurai constituency to ensure readiness.

title: Supplementary EVM Randomization for Erode East & Gobi
summary: Supplementary ballot unit randomization completed for Erode East and Gobichettipalayam due to high candidate numbers.

title: Second Randomization of Polling Personnel Completed
summary: Second randomization of polling personnel was completed on 8 April across all eight constituencies.

title: Income Tax Department Issues Compliance Appeals
summary: Income Tax Department issued appeals for full compliance during the election period to curb illegal cash flow.

title: Three Rivals Reside Within 100m in Periyar Nagar
summary: Three rival candidates from DMK, AIADMK, and BJP reside within 100 metres of each other in the Periyar Nagar neighbourhood.

title: DMK's N. Nallasivam Active in Gobichettipalayam
summary: DMK candidate N. Nallasivam is active in Gobichettipalayam with intensive door-to-door efforts.

title: AIADMK's S. Jayakumar Canvasses in Bhavani
summary: AIADMK candidate S. Jayakumar is canvassing in Bhavani constituency focusing on the change narrative.

title: DMK's Sivabalan Highlights Welfare in Anthiyur
summary: DMK candidate M. Sivabalan is campaigning in Anthiyur highlighting welfare schemes.

title: Thoppu Venkatachalam Contests Perundurai for DMK
summary: DMK's Thoppu N.D. Venkatachalam contests in Perundurai with a strong local development focus.

title: TVK's K.K. Anand Mohan Continues Solo Campaign
summary: TVK candidate K.K. Anand Mohan filed nomination earlier and continues his solo campaign in Erode West.

title: EVM Readiness Confirmed for 2,379 Polling Stations
summary: EVM and VVPAT readiness has been confirmed for all 2,379 polling stations across Erode district ahead of April 23 polls.

title: 17.59 Lakh Voters Registered Across the District
summary: Over 17.59 lakh voters (8,47,197 men, 9,11,778 women, 182 third-gender) are registered in Erode district.

title: 131 Nominations Accepted, 71 Rejected After Scrutiny
summary: 131 nominations were accepted and 71 rejected after scrutiny on 7 April across the eight constituencies.

title: EVM Commissioning Underway in Erode Constituencies
summary: Election officials in Erode have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

title: DMK Intensifies Final-Phase Outreach in Erode
summary: DMK candidates and alliance workers have intensified door-to-door outreach across Erode, focusing on welfare scheme beneficiaries and first-time voters.

title: SVEEP Street Plays Boost Voter Awareness in Erode
summary: SVEEP teams in Erode performed street plays at bus stands and markets to encourage 100% voter turnout on April 23.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Vehicle Checks in Erode
summary: Flying squads in Erode have intensified vehicle checks at major entry points and highway intersections to curb illegal cash movement.

title: Erode Reports Smooth Progress on Postal Ballot Distribution
summary: District election officials confirmed that postal ballot distribution to service voters and senior citizens in Erode is progressing as per schedule.

title: AIADMK Holds Booth-Level Worker Meetings in Erode
summary: AIADMK held booth-level worker meetings across Erode to finalize polling-day strategy and voter mobilization plans.

title: Erode Colleges Host Voter Pledge Programs
summary: Colleges across Erode hosted voter pledge programs for first-time voters, accompanied by mock EVM demonstrations.

title: Erode Static Surveillance Teams Report Daily to Observers
summary: Static surveillance teams in Erode are reporting daily to election observers on cash, liquor, and freebie movement.

title: Strong Rooms Sealed in Erode After Final Randomization
summary: EVM strong rooms across Erode have been sealed under multi-tier security following the final randomization of polling personnel.

title: BJP Highlights Central Schemes During Erode Roadshow
summary: BJP candidates conducted a roadshow in Erode highlighting central government welfare schemes and infrastructure investments.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Crosses Halfway Mark in Erode
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution in Erode has crossed the halfway mark, with BLOs targeting full coverage by April 18.

title: MCC Violation Notices Issued in Erode Constituencies
summary: Several model code of conduct violation notices have been issued in Erode constituencies for unauthorised hoardings and campaign material.

title: Erode Collector Reviews Polling Station Readiness
summary: The District Collector held a review meeting with returning officers in Erode to assess polling station readiness, water supply, and accessibility ramps.

title: TVK Cadre Steps Up Door-to-Door Drive in Erode
summary: TVK cadre led by local coordinators stepped up the door-to-door campaign across Erode, distributing pamphlets and party manifestos.

title: Erode Administration Installs Awareness Hoardings
summary: The Erode district administration has installed voter awareness hoardings at major junctions, urging citizens to exercise their franchise.

title: Erode Police Beef Up Security at Sensitive Booths
summary: Erode district police have beefed up security at sensitive booths with paramilitary deployment and additional patrol vehicles.

title: Mock Polls Demonstrated to Candidates in Erode
summary: Mock polls were demonstrated to candidate representatives in Erode as part of EVM transparency measures before the April 23 election.

title: Congress Workers Hold Street-Corner Meetings in Erode
summary: Congress alliance workers held street-corner meetings in Erode to highlight the alliance's promises on education and healthcare.

title: Voter Helpline Sees Spike in Calls from Erode
summary: The state voter helpline has seen a spike in calls from Erode, mostly enquiring about polling station details and voter slip status.

title: Liquor Seizure Reported During Erode Checks
summary: A significant liquor seizure was reported during routine election-related checks in Erode, and the contraband has been impounded.

title: Erode Voter List Final Verification Concluded
summary: Booth-level officers in Erode have concluded the final voter list verification, ensuring electoral roll accuracy ahead of polling.

title: NTK Organises Cycle Rally Across Erode Towns
summary: Naam Tamilar Katchi organised a cycle rally across Erode towns to highlight environmental and identity-based issues ahead of polling.

title: Erode Differently-Abled Voters Get Dedicated Assistance
summary: Differently-abled voters in Erode are receiving dedicated transport and assistance arrangements from the district election office.

title: Income Tax Teams Conduct Discreet Surveys in Erode
summary: Income Tax teams have been conducting discreet surveys in Erode to track unaccounted financial flows linked to the election period.

title: Sector Officers Deployed Across Erode Polling Zones
summary: Sector officers have been deployed across Erode polling zones to monitor turnout, address grievances, and report issues in real time.

title: Star Campaigners Schedule Final Rallies in Erode
summary: Major political parties have scheduled final-phase rallies of star campaigners in Erode as the silent period nears.

title: Social Media Influencers Promote Turnout in Erode
summary: Local social media influencers in Erode are running short-form video campaigns urging youth to vote on April 23.

title: Erode Cybercrime Cell Monitors Election Misinformation
summary: The Erode cybercrime cell is actively monitoring social media platforms for election-related misinformation and hate speech.

title: Erode Election Control Room Operates Round the Clock
summary: The election control room in Erode is functioning round the clock to handle voter complaints, MCC violations, and logistical queries.

title: Women Self-Help Groups Address Erode Candidates
summary: Women self-help group federations in Erode addressed candidates seeking concrete commitments on livelihood and credit access.

title: Erode Senior Citizens Avail Home Voting Facility
summary: Senior citizens above 85 in Erode are availing the home voting facility, with polling teams visiting registered residences.

title: Bank Cash Movement Tracked in Erode
summary: Bank cash movement above the threshold in Erode is being tracked and verified by election expenditure observers.

title: EVM Commissioning Underway in Erode Constituencies
summary: Election officials in Erode have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

title: Trader Associations Submit Memorandum to Erode Candidates
summary: Trader associations submitted a joint memorandum to candidates in Erode seeking GST relief and infrastructure support.

summary: SVEEP teams in Erode performed street plays at bus stands and markets to encourage 100% voter turnout on April 23.

summary: Flying squads in Erode have intensified vehicle checks at major entry points and highway intersections to curb illegal cash movement.

summary: District election officials confirmed that postal ballot distribution to service voters and senior citizens in Erode is progressing as per schedule.

title: Erode Farmers Raise Pricing Concerns at Public Meeting
summary: Farmers in Erode raised concerns over crop pricing and procurement at a public meeting attended by alliance candidates.
